modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Bluetooth driver error on Lenovo laptop in Device Manager

full_description_text: 
El bluetooth no está funcionando en mi laptop Lenovo. Hay un error picture junto a él en Device Manager. Necesito ayuda para arreglar mi driver de bluetooth.
short_description: Bluetooth driver error on Lenovo laptop in Device Manager
description: El bluetooth no está funcionando en mi laptop Lenovo. Hay un error picture junto a él en Device Manager. Necesito ayuda para arreglar mi driver de bluetooth.
